prompt: Sort out the ambiguity between the 'workstation' and 'desktop' profiles in this NixOS cosmo configuration. Currently there are two overlapping concepts: 'desktop' was intended to configure everything for a host connected to physical peripherals (keyboard, mouse, monitor, speakers, etc.), while 'workstation' is for hosts that include a window manager (Hyprland). The naming is confusing and the boundaries between them may be blurry. Your task: 1) Explore both profiles thoroughly (check home/ and modules/ directories for both desktop and workstation related files). 2) Clarify the separation of concerns - peripheral/hardware-related config vs window-manager/GUI config. 3) Improve the naming if you can find something clearer that better communicates the intent. 4) Make sure imports and references are updated consistently across the repo. 5) Run nix flake check before creating the PR to make sure nothing is broken.
